SEARCH
Package org.skeleton.map

Class Lane

java.lang.Object
org.skeleton.map.Lane
public class Lane extends Object
Represents a single lane on a road. Tracks snow thickness, surface type, modifiers like salt/gravel, and vehicles currently on the lane.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Lane()
    Constructs a new Lane with a clean surface and no vehicles.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    acceptVehicle(Vehicle v)
    Accepts a vehicle onto the lane if the surface allows it.
    void

    Adds snow to the lane, accounting for salt and gravel.
    boolean
    clean(PlowHead head, Inventory inv)
    Attempts to clean the lane using a plow head and resources.
    Road
    getRoad()
    Gets the road this lane belongs to.
    int
    getSnowThickness()
    Gets the current snow thickness.
    Surface
    getSurface()
    Gets the current surface of the lane.
    int
    getTrampleCount()
    Gets the trample count.
    void
    incrementTrampleCount()
    Increments the count of times snow has been trampled on this lane.
    boolean
    isAccessible()
    Checks if the lane is accessible based on its surface.
    boolean
    isGraveled()
    Checks if the lane is covered with gravel.
    boolean
    isSalted()
    Checks if the lane is currently salted.
    void
    propagateCrash()
    Propagates a crash to all vehicles on this lane.

    Receives snow on the lane (alias for addSnow).

    Removes a vehicle from the lane.

    Sets whether the lane is covered with gravel.
    void

    Sets the road this lane belongs to.
    void
    setSalted(boolean b)
    Sets whether the lane is salted.
    void
    setSnowThickness(int amount)
    Sets the snow thickness.
    void
    setSurface(Surface s)
    Sets the surface type of the lane.

  • Constructor Details

    • Lane

      public Lane()
      Constructs a new Lane with a clean surface and no vehicles.

  • Method Details

    • addSnow

      public void addSnow(int amount)
      Adds snow to the lane, accounting for salt and gravel.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount of snow to add.

    • propagateCrash

      public void propagateCrash()
      Propagates a crash to all vehicles on this lane.

    • getSurface

      public Surface getSurface()
      Gets the current surface of the lane.
      Returns:
      The surface object.

    • acceptVehicle

      public boolean acceptVehicle(Vehicle v)
      Accepts a vehicle onto the lane if the surface allows it.
      Parameters:
      v - The vehicle to accept.
      Returns:
      true if the vehicle was accepted, false otherwise.

    • removeVehicle

      public void removeVehicle(Vehicle v)
      Removes a vehicle from the lane.
      Parameters:
      v - The vehicle to remove.

    • clean

      public boolean clean(PlowHead head, Inventory inv)
      Attempts to clean the lane using a plow head and resources.
      Parameters:
      head - The plow head used for cleaning.
      inv - The inventory containing resources.
      Returns:
      true if cleaning was successful, false otherwise.

    • setSurface

      public void setSurface(Surface s)
      Sets the surface type of the lane.
      Parameters:
      s - The new surface.

    • setGraveled

      public void setGraveled(boolean b)
      Sets whether the lane is covered with gravel.
      Parameters:
      b - true to gravel the lane, false otherwise.

    • isGraveled

      public boolean isGraveled()
      Checks if the lane is covered with gravel.
      Returns:
      true if graveled, false otherwise.

    • setSalted

      public void setSalted(boolean b)
      Sets whether the lane is salted.
      Parameters:
      b - true to salt the lane, false otherwise.

    • isSalted

      public boolean isSalted()
      Checks if the lane is currently salted.
      Returns:
      true if salt amount is greater than zero, false otherwise.

    • getSnowThickness

      public int getSnowThickness()
      Gets the current snow thickness.
      Returns:
      The snow thickness value.

    • setSnowThickness

      public void setSnowThickness(int amount)
      Sets the snow thickness.
      Parameters:
      amount - The new thickness value.

    • incrementTrampleCount

      public void incrementTrampleCount()
      Increments the count of times snow has been trampled on this lane.

    • getTrampleCount

      public int getTrampleCount()
      Gets the trample count.
      Returns:
      The trample count value.

    • receiveSnow

      public void receiveSnow(int amount)
      Receives snow on the lane (alias for addSnow).
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount of snow received.

    • isAccessible

      public boolean isAccessible()
      Checks if the lane is accessible based on its surface.
      Returns:
      true if accessible, false otherwise.

    • setRoad

      public void setRoad(Road r)
      Sets the road this lane belongs to.
      Parameters:
      r - The road instance.

    • getRoad

      public Road getRoad()
      Gets the road this lane belongs to.
      Returns:
      The road instance.
